candidate_definition_hints.text: The ChatGPT Retrieval Plugin lets you easily find personal or work documents by asking questions in natural language.
Build Custom GPTs with a Retrieval Plugin backend to give ChatGPT access to personal documents.

candidate_glosses.text: Build Custom GPTs with a Retrieval Plugin backend to give ChatGPT access to personal documents.
